message.content:
@startuml

actor Actor
participant EventBus
box "Service Orchestrator" #green
participant "so" as so
end box
box "Software Defined Infrastructure" #olive
participant "storageresource" as sr
end box

Actor -> so : Version Application Stack
so -> sr : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
so --> EventBus : data.list
so -> sr : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
so --> EventBus : data.list

@enduml
